doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document dangerously misstates Illinois eviction law by claiming tenants must vacate without any court proceeding, and no genuine HUD fact sheet would strip tenants of their fundamental right to a court hearing before eviction.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document grossly misstates Illinois law — a 5-day pay-or-quit notice does NOT require the tenant to vacate without court proceedings; Illinois law requires landlords to file an eviction lawsuit and obtain a court order before a tenant must leave — and HUD would never co-issue guidance with an Illinois AG office telling tenants they have no right to a court hearing, making this a dangerous fabrication designed to mislead tenants into waiving fundamental legal protections.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: The document dangerously misstates Illinois eviction law by claiming tenants must vacate without any court proceeding, and no genuine HUD fact sheet would strip tenants of their fundamental right to a court hearing before eviction.
